news.title: Bessent says global 15% tariff starts this week, predicts Trump duties will return to old levels later this year
news.summary: The Supreme Court last month ruled that President Donald Trump's sweeping global tariffs are not authorized under the law known as IEEPA. The Supreme Court ruled that the president's sweepingGlobal Tariffs Act is not authorized by the law.

news.title: 'No to war’: Spain PM hits back at Trump threat to cut trade over air base dispute
news.summary: The U.S. president pledged to cut off all trade with Madrid over its position on the Iran conflict. His comments come after the U.N. Security Council passed a resolution condemning Iran's nuclear program.

news.title: Remember Twitter? Elon Musk expected to testify over flip-flop in $44 billion buyout
news.summary: Musk is on trial for a case filed by Twitter investors in 2022. The year he purchased the social media company for $44 billion.

news.title: U.S. crude oil retreats for the first session since Iran war began as Bessent pledges support
news.summary: The oil market has calmed after President Donald Trump said the U.S. would insure tankers and provide naval escorts if necessary. The oil market had been in a state of uncertainty over the future of the global oil market.

news.title: How this top-performing trend-following manager got ahead of the Iran conflict and a software rout
news.summary: Longboard Asset Management has made a strategy of not getting hung up on headlines. Here's what the trend-following manager sees as worth investing in now.

news.title: ADP says businesses add 63,000 jobs in February. Hiring picks up, but labor market is still sluggish.
news.summary: ADP: Businesses created 63,000 new jobs in February. It's the biggest increase in seven months. The increase is another sign that a sluggish U.S. labor market might be slightly perking up.

news.title: ‘When he doesn’t get money, he becomes angry’: My brother has led a life of chaos and financial ruin. What is my moral obligation?
news.summary: “Without clear distance and boundaries, he will pull me down with him,” she says. “Withoutclear distance and boundary, he’s going to pull you down too.”

news.title: There’s a new record number of 401(k) millionaires — and the Iran conflict will test their discipline
news.summary: The same financial habits that pushed the number of 401(k) millionaires to new highs should help retirement savers through the current global uncertainty.

news.title: Adidas shares slump on weak profit guidance as tariffs and exchange rates bite
news.summary: The German sporting-goods retailer announced a €400 million hit from tariffs and exchange rate changes. The retailer said it would take a year to recover from the hit.
